description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'XML_to_HL7_Lab' to transform XML lab results from /opt/mirthdata/xml_in/ into HL7 v2.x ORU^R01 messages. The transformation must map Patient and Order data to PID and OBR segments and generate a repeating OBX segment for every <Analyte> element, including Name, Value, Units, Range, and Flag. Export the resulting HL7 messages to /opt/mirthdata/hl7_out/ using the naming convention ${message.messageId}.hl7.
